title: pyrus lezania
intro: Pyrus lezania, also known as Korean mountain ash, is a type of deciduous tree native to the mountainous regions of Korea. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus lezania include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and prevent certain types of cancer. The bark and leaves can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
